hero.title: Support resources for getting more out of TalepNET
hero.description: Use this page as a starting point for product guidance, tutorials, blog content, and common questions.

resources.title: Start from the resource that fits what you need
resources.faqText: Find answers about product scope, pricing, security, and supplier portal workflows.
resources.tutorialsText: Explore guided tutorials for key workflows and day-to-day usage.
resources.blogText: Read product updates, procurement insights, and practical best practices.
resources.contactText: Reach the team directly when you need help, guidance, or a follow-up conversation.

cta.title: Need help with something more specific?
cta.description: If you need direct help from our team, use the contact page and send us the details of your request.
